title: Claude just dropped UltraCode... its Insane
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude's UltraCode, a feature that enables spinning up to 10 parallel agents managed by code rather than a master LLM. The video covers practical applications including judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan out, and building an agentic operating system with dynamic model selection via OpenRouter.
writeup: The video covers Claude's UltraCode release, which runs up to 10 parallel agents coordinated by code rather than a master LLM. It matters because orchestration logic moves from an LLM controller into deterministic code, changing how multi-agent workflows are structured. Key takeaways: support for deterministic fan out, judge panels, and adversarial verification, plus dynamic model selection through OpenRouter for agent orchestration.
